mapper.select:
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, NAME AS userName, PHONE AS userPhone, ROLE AS role, LAWYER_STATUS AS lawyerStatus, LICENSE_FILE AS licenseFile, JOIN_DATE AS requestDate FROM PRJ01.USERS WHERE LAWYER_STATUS = 'PENDING' AND ROLE = 'ROLE_LAWYER'
AND (USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY JOIN_DATE DESC

SELECT USER_ID AS userId, NAME AS userName, PHONE AS userPhone, ROLE AS role, LAWYER_STATUS AS lawyerStatus FROM PRJ01.USERS WHERE ROLE = 'ROLE_LAWYER' OR LAWYER_STATUS = 'PENDING' ORDER BY USER_ID DESC
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, NAME AS userName, PHONE AS userPhone, LAWYER_STATUS AS lawyerStatus, REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, LICENSE_FILE AS licenseFile FROM PRJ01.USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{lawyerId}
